title: Johns Hopkins Aramco Healthcare wins prestigious Amyaz Award for healthcare excellence in Saudi Arabia
summary: The Amyaz Award specifically honours organisations that demonstrate leadership and drive measurable improvements in patient safety and care delivery.
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
SAUDI ARABIA—Johns Hopkins Aramco Healthcare (JHAH) has earned top honors at the Ministry of Health’s prestigious Amyaz Award, distinguishing itself as the leading hospital across the Eastern Region.

His Royal Highness Prince Saud bin Nayef bin Abdulaziz Al Saud, Governor of the Eastern Province, offered his patronage to the recognition, which took place during the Eastern Province Health Investment Forum in Dammam on April 7, coinciding with World Health Day.

The Ministry of Health presented the award in acknowledgment of JHAH’s unwavering dedication to service excellence, patient experience, and innovation in healthcare delivery.

The Amyaz Award specifically honours organisations that demonstrate leadership and drive measurable improvements in patient safety and care delivery.

Distinguished recipients embody forward-thinking strategies, maintain strong governance, and implement initiatives that enhance the patient experience while advancing healthcare quality across the Kingdom.

Leadership vision and strategic growth

Dr. Howard Podolsky, Chief Executive Officer at Johns Hopkins Aramco Healthcare, expressed the significance of the achievement.

He described the award as meaningful recognition of their excellence and leadership in healthcare quality, patient safety, and innovation.

According to Podolsky, the honor validates the dedication of their teams and the care standards they uphold daily.

He underscored that their focus remains on strengthening community health, supporting well-being, and contributing to Saudi Arabia’s Vision 2030 goals.

The award arrives alongside substantial strategic expansions at JHAH, reflecting the organization’s commitment to advancing specialized and integrated care.

Recently, the organization launched its Cardiovascular Center of Excellence, representing the second center of excellence following its well-established Oncology Center of Excellence.

This expansion marks a significant step toward strengthening comprehensive specialty services nationwide.

Growing national and International recognition

JHAH achieved its highest national ranking to date, placing third among Saudi Arabian hospitals in Newsweek’s World’s Best Hospitals 2026 report.

This distinction further solidifies the organization’s growing reputation among leading healthcare institutions globally.

The awards ceremony brought together senior JHAH leadership, including Dr. Howard Podolsky; Dr. Russell Hales, Chief of Centers of Excellence; Dr. Mohammed Al Ghamdi, Chief of the Southern Area; and Willie Willemse, Chief of Strategy and Business Development.

Through its continued commitment to service excellence and innovation, Johns Hopkins Aramco Healthcare continues to shape the future of healthcare delivery in Saudi Arabia, combining world-class medical expertise with a patient-centered approach that meets the region’s evolving healthcare needs.
